violations.description: Modal dialog element has no role='dialog' attribute. Screen readers will not announce it as a dialog.
Modal lacks aria-modal='true' attribute. Screen readers may allow users to interact with background content while the modal is open.
Modal dialog has no aria-labelledby pointing to its heading. Screen readers cannot announce the modal's title when it opens.
violations.reference_fix: Added to Cart!

page_description: An e-commerce product page with a modal dialog that appears when clicking 'Add to Cart'. The modal lacks role='dialog', aria-modal, and aria-labelledby attributes.
